form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Chasing Rex at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 4yo+ NR up to 79 on March 20 at $5.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Ice Cold Sapporo at this track over 2185m in a 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on April 6 at $3.10. Sure to play a big role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly after the start was effected and tightened shortly after.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr4) over 2185m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track beaten 35 m by Ekara Navajo (2:38.30) in 4yo+ No NR M on April 6 at $16. At the run before good run when 2nd (Sr3) over 1776m at Wagin beaten 8 m by Wesmedad (2:13.70) in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs M on March 27 at $2.30. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr7) over 1177m at this track, beaten 7 m by You Fly With Me (1:23.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $31. Before that, was well back in the run when 4th (Fr3) over 2185m at this track beaten 17 m by Bettathanlife (2:39.00) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 61 on March 30 at $16. Thereabouts of late so worth some thought.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: The middle hopple carrying strap worked loose during running.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing third behind Brewery Lane at Gloucester Park over 2503m in a NR up to 80 on March 31 at $3.10. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Blameitonthenight at Bunbury over 2503m in a NR up to 80 on April 4 at $3.50. Going along well. Top prospects.

form.formComment: Last start by 3 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at this track (2:41.30) beating By Gee By Jingo in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on April 6 at $7.50. In the right form and can score again.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr6) over 2185m at this track, beaten 21 m by Sammy Suffarell (2:38.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 65 on April 6 at $2.15. Plenty to like about his prospects.
